MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-22-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BASIS TRANSPORTATION, INC. AND IOSIF BASIS DBA BASIS TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES WAS HEARD. JACQUELINE KALLBERG, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR MOVING PARTIES. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/26/20 IS CONTINUED TO 05/24/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. JURY FEES WERE POSTED LATE, HOWEVER THE COURT WAIVED ANY IRREGULARITIES AND SET THIS CASE AS A JURY TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. KALLBERG TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
